name: ReRhythm
summary: Generative AI platform demonstrating enterprise AI capabilities with AWS Bedrock, Claude, ChromaDB, RAG, CloudFormation, and ECS. The platform ingests, processes, and analyzes complex document data to identify skill gaps and generate intelligent workflow recommendations.
